1896000.name: Construction Manager
1896000.description:
Find contracts suitable for your company and construct the buildings according to the client's plans or use your imagination to design buildings yourself. Build skyscrapers or houses; the choice is yours.

Plan the workload as needed, order the materials and do not forget to keep an eye on the productivity of your employees. Avoid downtime to meet deadlines, otherwise you'll pay a fee for the delay.

Expand your business to get more complex and profitable projects, buy machines, hire employees and become the most successful construction manager!
1896000.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 波兰语
